title: Whiskers and Memories
subtitle: A Guided Grief Journal for the Loss of a Beloved Cat
author: Eleanor Hartley
art_prompt: soft pastel watercolor wide panoramic scene, a cat sitting in the exact center of the frame on a windowsill gazing out, a wide symmetrical view of tranquil rolling hills and gentle mist stretching equally far into the distance on both the left and right sides, golden hour, serene and expansive, tender, peaceful, no text, no words
